channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] Chief Officer / General cargo vessel / ASAP at
[Gold Job] Chief Officer DPO for DP2 Fast Supply Intervention Vessel / Crew Boat at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 3rd Officer position is available for qualified candidates. This role supports navigation and deck duties.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Officer Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Applications are invited for a 2nd Officer role. Responsibilities include navigation, watchkeeping, and assisting the Chief Officer.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Officer Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer position is open. This role focuses on cargo operations, safety, and the deck department's management onboard.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Master position is available. This role involves overall command and responsibility for the safe and efficient operation of a vessel.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime employer is inviting applications for the position of Master. Candidates should download the Master's Application Form and submit it via email. Details regarding vessel type, contract duration, and joining date are not specified in this announcement.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Job Application at Avin International S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Applications are being accepted for the position of Chief Officer. Candidates interested in this maritime role should download the application form and return it via email. Details concerning vessel type, contract duration, and joining date are not provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job Application at Avin International S.A.
